Example_EN: There is no entry without a valid ticket tonight.
Example_CN: 今晚没有有效票不能入场。

Collocation: sealed envelope;put in an envelope;brown envelope
Example_EN: Please put the letter in a sealed envelope.
Example_CN: 请把信放进密封信封。

Example_EN: We should all help protect the environment.
Example_CN: 我们都应帮助保护环境。

Example_EN: Plastic waste is a serious environmental issue.
Example_CN: 塑料垃圾是严重的环境问题。

Example_EN: I watched the final episode of the series last night.
Example_CN: 昨晚我看了这部剧的最后一集。

Example_EN: All players should have equal chances to speak.
Example_CN: 所有队员应有平等发言机会。

Example_EN: Time and money are equally important for this plan.
Example_CN: 时间和金钱对这个计划同样重要。

Example_EN: The school bought new sports equipment last term.
Example_CN: 上学期学校买了新的体育器材。

Example_EN: One euro is roughly equivalent to less than one pound.
Example_CN: 一欧元大约相当于不到一英镑。

Example_EN: The internet began a new era of communication.
Example_CN: 互联网开启了通信新时代。

Collocation: make an error;human error;error of judgement
Example_EN: A small typing error changed the whole meaning.
Example_CN: 一个小小的打字错误改变了整句意思。

Example_EN: The bird managed to escape from its cage.
Example_CN: 那只鸟设法从笼子里逃了出去。

Example_EN: I love rainy days, especially when I can stay home.
Example_CN: 我喜欢雨天，尤其是可以待在家里的时候。

Example_EN: Please write a short essay about your hometown.
Example_CN: 请写一篇关于家乡的短文。

Example_EN: Fresh water is essential for human life.
Example_CN: 淡水对人类生命必不可少。

Example_EN: The two plans are essentially the same idea.
Example_CN: 这两个计划本质上是同一想法。

Example_EN: They hope to establish a small café next year.
Example_CN: 他们希望明年开一家小咖啡馆。

Example_EN: His family owns a large estate in the countryside.
Example_CN: 他家在乡下有一座大庄园。

Example_EN: Can you estimate the cost of repairing the roof?
Example_CN: 你能估一下修屋顶的费用吗？

Example_EN: The city is famous for its rich ethnic food.
Example_CN: 这座城市以丰富的民族美食闻名。

Collocation: pay in euros;euro coin;cost in euros
Example_EN: The ticket costs twenty euros per adult.
Example_CN: 门票每位成人二十欧元。

Example_EN: Teachers evaluate performance at the end of term.
Example_CN: 老师在学期末评估表现。

Example_EN: The project needs careful evaluation before we continue.
Example_CN: 继续前这个项目需要仔细评估。

Example_EN: The second film was even better than the first.
Example_CN: 第二部电影甚至比第一部更好。

Collocation: special event;sports event;in the event of
Example_EN: The sports event attracted hundreds of visitors.
Example_CN: 这次体育活动吸引了数百名参观者。

Example_EN: After three hours, we eventually found the right road.
Example_CN: 三个小时后我们终于找到了正确的路。

Example_EN: Have you ever visited Scotland in winter?
Example_CN: 你冬天去过苏格兰吗？

Example_EN: Mobile phones are part of everyday life now.
Example_CN: 手机现在已是日常生活的一部分。

Example_EN: We looked everywhere, but we could not find the keys.
Example_CN: 我们到处找，但找不到钥匙。

Example_EN: Police found strong evidence near the broken window.
Example_CN: 警方在破窗附近发现有力证据。

Example_EN: In the story, good finally defeats evil.
Example_CN: 故事里善良最终击败了邪恶。

Example_EN: We studied the evolution of language in history class.
Example_CN: 历史课上我们学习了语言的演变。

Collocation: evolve into;evolve over time;continue to evolve
Example_EN: Cities continue to evolve as populations grow.
Example_CN: 随着人口增长，城市继续演变。

Example_EN: Please tell me the exact time of your arrival.
Example_CN: 请告诉我你到达的确切时间。

Example_EN: That is exactly what I meant to say.
Example_CN: 那正是我想说的。

Example_EN: She passed her final examination with high marks.
Example_CN: 她以高分通过了期末考试。

Collocation: examine carefully;examine the evidence;examine a patient
Example_EN: Doctors examine patients carefully before giving medicine.
Example_CN: 医生开药前仔细检查病人。

Example_EN: Congratulations on your excellent exam results!
Example_CN: 祝贺你优秀的考试成绩！

Example_EN: Everyone came to the meeting except Tom.
Example_CN: 除了汤姆，大家都来开会了。

Example_EN: The teacher will not make an exception this time.
Example_CN: 这次老师不会破例。

Example_CN: 讨论课上学生们交流想法。

Collocation: sense of excitement;full of excitement;excitement of
Example_EN: There was a sense of excitement before the concert.
Example_CN: 音乐会前有一种兴奋感。

Example_EN: Do not exclude her from the group discussion.
Example_CN: 不要把她排除在小组讨论之外。

Example_EN: Excuse me, could you tell me the way to the station?
Example_CN: 打扰一下，能告诉我去车站的路吗？

Example_EN: A senior executive will visit our office tomorrow.
Example_CN: 一位高管明天将访问我们办公室。

Example_EN: Do not exhaust yourself before the big match.
Example_CN: 大赛前不要把自己累垮。

Example_EN: After the long hike, we all felt exhausted.
Example_CN: 长途徒步后，我们都筋疲力尽。

Example_EN: The museum will exhibit local artists next month.
Example_CN: 博物馆下月将展出本地艺术家作品。

Example_EN: We visited an art exhibition at the city gallery.
Example_CN: 我们在市美术馆参观了艺术展览。

Collocation: continue to exist;exist in;no longer exist
Example_EN: Dinosaurs no longer exist on earth today.
Example_CN: 恐龙今天已不存在于地球上。

Example_EN: This painting has been in existence for two hundred years.
Example_CN: 这幅画已存在两百年。

Example_EN: Please exit the building quickly if you hear the alarm.
Example_CN: 听到警报请迅速离开大楼。

Example_EN: The company plans to expand into Europe next year.
Example_CN: 公司计划明年扩展到欧洲。

Example_EN: Rapid expansion created new jobs in the city.
Example_CN: 快速扩张为城市创造了新工作。

Example_EN: I expect to finish the report by Friday.
Example_CN: 我预计周五前完成报告。

Example_EN: Her results exceeded all our expectations.
Example_CN: 她的成绩超出了我们所有的期望。

Example_EN: The train arrived on time, as expected.
Example_CN: 火车如预期准时到达。

Collocation: at one's own expense;travel expense;expense of
Example_EN: She paid for the course at her own expense.
Example_CN: 她自费上了这门课。

Example_EN: Travel abroad was a valuable experience for him.
Example_CN: 出国旅行对他是一次宝贵经历。

Example_EN: An experienced teacher handled the difficult class well.
Example_CN: 一位有经验的老师妥善应对了难带的班级。

Collocation: science experiment;carry out an experiment;experiment with
Example_EN: Students carried out a simple science experiment today.
Example_CN: 学生今天做了一个简单的科学实验。

Example_EN: She is an expert in ancient Chinese history.
Example_CN: 她是中国古代史专家。

Example_EN: The teacher gave a clear explanation of the rule.
Example_CN: 老师把规则解释得很清楚。

Example_EN: The firework did not explode as planned.
Example_CN: 烟花没有按计划爆炸。

Example_EN: Do not exploit workers by paying unfair wages.
Example_CN: 不要用不公工资剥削工人。

Example_EN: Space exploration inspires many young scientists.
Example_CN: 太空探索激励许多年轻科学家。

Example_EN: We decided to explore the old town on foot.
Example_CN: 我们决定步行探索老城区。

Example_EN: A loud explosion woke people in the middle of the night.
Example_CN: 一声巨响在半夜吵醒了人们。

Example_EN: Coffee is the main export of this small country.
Example_CN: 咖啡是这个小国的主要出口商品。

Collocation: expose to;expose a secret;expose yourself to
Example_EN: Doctors warn us not to expose skin to strong sun.
Example_CN: 医生告诫我们不要让皮肤暴露在强日光下。

Example_EN: Too much sun exposure can damage your skin.
Example_CN: 过度日晒会损伤皮肤。

Example_EN: Please express your opinion clearly in the meeting.
Example_CN: 请在会上清楚表达你的意见。

Example_EN: Her facial expression showed she was surprised.
Example_CN: 她的面部表情显示出她很惊讶。

Collocation: extend a deadline;extend an invitation;extend to
Example_EN: The teacher agreed to extend the deadline by two days.
Example_CN: 老师同意把截止日期延长两天。

Example_EN: Students requested an extension for the final essay.
Example_CN: 学生们请求延长期末论文期限。

Example_EN: She has extensive knowledge of British history.
Example_CN: 她对英国历史有广博知识。

Example_EN: To some extent, luck played a role in his success.
Example_CN: 某种程度上，运气在他成功中起了作用。

Example_EN: External factors also affected the test results.
Example_CN: 外部因素也影响了测试结果。

Example_EN: We need extra time to finish the group project.
Example_CN: 我们需要额外时间完成小组项目。

Example_EN: She showed extraordinary talent in music at age ten.
Example_CN: 她十岁就展现出非凡的音乐才能。

Example_EN: Extreme weather delayed all flights this morning.
Example_CN: 极端天气今早延误了所有航班。

Example_EN: It is extremely important to lock the door at night.
Example_CN: 晚上锁门极其重要。

Example_EN: This soft fabric is perfect for summer clothes.
Example_CN: 这种柔软面料很适合做夏装。

Example_EN: The new sports facility opened last weekend.
Example_CN: 新的体育设施上周末开放了。

Example_EN: Hard work is a key factor in exam success.
Example_CN: 努力是考试成功的关键因素。

Example_EN: Do not let fear of failure stop you from trying.
Example_CN: 不要让害怕失败阻止你尝试。

Example_EN: She felt faint after standing in the heat too long.
Example_CN: 她在高温下站太久后感到晕眩。

Example_EN: The teacher made a fair decision about the marks.
Example_CN: 老师对分数作出了公正决定。

Example_EN: The test was fairly easy for most students.
Example_CN: 对多数学生来说这次测验相当简单。

Example_EN: Keep faith in yourself during difficult times.
Example_CN: 困难时期要对自己有信心。

Example_EN: Do not share false information on social media.
Example_CN: 不要在社交媒体上分享虚假信息。

Collocation: rise to fame;fame and fortune;seek fame
Example_EN: The young singer rose to fame within a year.
Example_CN: 这位年轻歌手一年内成名。

Example_EN: This street looks familiar, but I cannot remember why.
Example_CN: 这条街看起来很眼熟，但我想不起为什么。

Example_EN: She has been a football fan since childhood.
Example_CN: 她从小就是足球迷。

Example_EN: Do you fancy a coffee after class today?
Example_CN: 今天课后想不想喝杯咖啡？

Example_EN: That is a fantastic idea for the class project!
Example_CN: 那是班级项目的绝妙主意！

Collocation: fantasy world;fantasy novel;live in a fantasy

Example_CN: 孩子们常在游戏中创造幻想世界。

Example_EN: Organic farming is growing more popular here.
Example_CN: 有机农业在这里越来越受欢迎。

Example_EN: The museum has a fascinating collection of fossils.
Example_CN: 博物馆有一套迷人的化石藏品。

Example_EN: Wide jeans are back in fashion this year.
Example_CN: 宽裤今年又流行了。
